recommendations.title: Zenon: Girl of the 21st Century
recommendations.genres: Family, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar, a 13-year-old girl who lives on a space station in the year 2049, gets into some trouble and is banished to Earth. With help from some Earth friends she must find her way back.

recommendations.title: Don't Look Under the Bed
recommendations.overview: A girl calls on her brother's imaginary friend to banish a mischievous boogeyman who has framed her for his pranks.

recommendations.title: Short Circuit 2
recommendations.overview: Robot Johnny 5 moves to the city to help his friend Ben Jahrvi with his toy manufacturing enterprise, only to be manipulated by criminals who want to use him for their own nefarious purposes.

recommendations.title: Steel
recommendations.overview: When a renegade military reject puts new superweapons in dangerous hands, John Henry Irons becomes Steel. Wearing body armor, wielding a fearsome electrohammer and riding a gadget-packed motorcycle, he's ready to wage war... if he can fix the untimel

recommendations.title: Hulk
recommendations.overview: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers massive radiation exposure in his laboratory that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry.

recommendations.title: The Incredible Shrinking Man
recommendations.overview: A dangerous combination of radiation and insecticide causes the unfortunate Scott Carey to shrink, slowly but surely, until he is only a few inches tall. His home becomes a wilderness where he must survive everything from spiders living in the cellar

recommendations.title: The Death of the Incredible Hulk
recommendations.genres: Action, Drama, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: In his final attempt to free himself from the curse of the Hulk, Dr. David Banner becomes involved in a dangerous international espionage mission that may finally lead to a cure. As forces close in and the stakes rise, Banner faces an ultimate sacrif

recommendations.title: The Trial of the Incredible Hulk
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Drama, Action, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Falsely accused of assault, Dr. David Banner is arrested and placed on trial, facing the possibility of a long prison sentence. Blind attorney Matt Murdock takes on his defence, while secretly operating as the vigilante Daredevil. As the courtroom ba

recommendations.title: Bride of Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: Dr. Frankenstein and his monster both turn out to be alive after being attacked by an angry mob. The now-chastened scientist attempts to escape his past, but a former mentor forces him to assist with the creation of a new creature.

recommendations.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
